        cases' hP_in_support with hP_in_sigma hP_bot

haveI := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A

haveI := hMT
  have h_support_finite : Set.Finite (Module.support A M ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1}) :=
    Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hMT
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ : ∃ t : Finset (PrimeSpectrum A),
      ↑t = Module.support A M ∩ {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1} :=
    Set.Finite.exists_finset_eq h_support_finite

    Module.IsTorsion.structureTheorem_PID hS_pid hM_localized hM_torsion_localized

have h_sigma_finite : Set.Finite {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1 ∧ p ∈ Module.support A M} :=
    Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hMT

        IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization (⨅ p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl)) :=
      HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization

        M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] (Π i, A ⧸ (p i).1 ^ (e i)) := by
      intro h_t
      have h_primary : ∃ (p : ι → PrimeSpectrum A) (e : ι → ℕ),

        exact h_t
      obtain ⟨p, e, hp, he_pos, h_iso⟩ := h_primary
      refine ⟨fun i ↦ ⟨p i, ?_⟩, e, ?_, he_pos, ?_⟩

          have h_mem : ⟨p i, Ideal.isPrime_of_isPrimary hp⟩ ∈ σ := by
            simp [σ, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite]
            exact h_t (Submodule.Quotient.mk ⟨0, 1⟩)
          rw [hσ] at h_mem
          simp_all
        exact h_height
      · intro i
        have h_height : (p i).primeHeight = 1 := by

            simp [σ, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Module.mem_support_iff_of_finite]

          apply PseudoIsomorphism.of_linearEquiv

          apply PseudoIsomorphism.refl
        exact PseudoIsomorphism.trans h_pseudo h_final
    exact h_struct h_tors
  exact h_decomp hMT

have h1 : ∃ (ι : Type u) (_ : Fintype ι) (p : ι → PrimeSpectrum A) (_ : ∀ i, (p i).1.primeHeight = 1)
      (e : ι → ℕ) (_ : ∀ i, 0 < e i),
      LocalizedModule (⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1 ∧ p.1 ∈ Module.support A M}, p.1.primeCompl) M ≃ₗ[Localization _]
